modeSelector.label: Strategy mode
modeSelector.researchNotice: Research-state / forward-validation only — not funded; validate with paper trading before allocating real money.

marketContext.title: Market context
marketContext.description: Latest macro & index readings (FRED + Alpha Vantage), updated daily. Structured data only.
marketContext.empty: No market-context data yet. The daily fetch populates this once configured.

advisor.title: AI Advisor
advisor.description: Daily AI guidance per sleeve, grounded in the quant signal + news + market context and gated by a safety red-team eval. Research-only — never a trade instruction.
advisor.empty: No AI advice yet. The daily precompute populates this once configured.
advisor.fallback: AI advice did not pass the safety check today and was skipped for this sleeve. The quant signal, news and risk panels are unaffected.
advisor.disclaimer: This is a research reference, not an earnings prediction. The final decision is yours.

hero.navDescription: Cash + equity, single research account (manual, no broker).
hero.dayPnlDescription: Mark-to-market vs the prior trading day's close.

news.title: Today's market news
news.description: Latest market headlines (SEC EDGAR + Yahoo RSS), updated daily. Headlines only — no AI commentary.
news.empty: No market news yet. The daily fetch populates this once configured.

sleeves.title: Sleeve breakdown
sleeves.description: Each sleeve's share of marked NAV + its day P&L. Read-only.

list.title: Sleeves
list.deeplinkHint: Append <param>?selected=B013-regime-quarterly</param> to deep-link a detail panel.

details.selectHint: Select a sleeve from the list above to see config + provenance + charts.

equity.title: Equity curve
equity.description: Populated by the F008 backtest runner — wraps the F004 EquityCurveChart.

drawdown.title: Drawdown
drawdown.description: Shares the time axis with the equity curve (F008).

heatmap.title: Turnover heatmap
heatmap.description: Cells appear when sweep data lands (F008/F009 wire real values).

usQualityMomentum.name: US Quality Momentum
usQualityMomentum.tagline: 5-factor rules-based sleeve, monthly rebalance, ≤7% per position, ≤30% per sector.
usQualityMomentum.factorWeights: 0.35 Momentum + 0.30 Quality + 0.15 Low Vol + 0.10 Value + 0.10 Trend
usQualityMomentum.earningsWindowValue: No new positions within 5 trading days of an earnings release
usQualityMomentum.dataSource: Synthetic fixture (synthetic data, not actual filings)

backtest.title: Backtest viewer
backtest.timeout: Backtest is taking longer than expected — the worker may be busy or offline. Try again shortly.

selector.title: Selector
selector.description: Pick a strategy + snapshot + window, then Run.

backtest.emptyData: No backtest data yet — run a data refresh first.
backtest.invalidRange: Pick a range within the data coverage ({minUsableStart} – {dataEnd}).

errorKind.insufficient_history: The selected range lacks enough price history to estimate volatility. Pick a start date on or after {minUsableStart}.
errorKind.no_signal_dates: No quarter-end signal dates fall in the selected range. Widen the range.
errorKind.data_unavailable: Backtest data isn't ready yet — run a data refresh first.
errorKind.unknown: The backtest couldn't run for the selected range. Try a different range.
errorKind.inactive_strategy: Research-state strategies don't support a standalone backtest yet. Pick an active strategy.
errorKind.interrupted: This backtest was interrupted (the worker restarted while it was running). Please run it again.

metrics.title: Headline metrics
metrics.description: Synthetic engine in F008 — real numbers land in B023.

equity.title: Equity curve
equity.description: Master vs benchmarks; pan/zoom syncs the drawdown chart below.

explanation.title: Why these results
explanation.aiNote: AI-generated explanation, grounded in the backtest's real metrics.

tooltips.sharpe: Risk-adjusted return: excess return earned per unit of volatility. Higher is better. A historical backtest statistic, not a future prediction.
tooltips.sortino: Like Sharpe, but penalises only downside volatility. Higher is better. Historical statistic, not a prediction.
tooltips.calmar: Annual return ÷ maximum drawdown — return earned per unit of drawdown. Higher is better. Historical statistic.
tooltips.cagr: Compound annual growth rate over the backtest period. A historical result, not a promised or expected return.
tooltips.maxDrawdown: Largest peak-to-trough drop during the backtest. Closer to 0 is better. Historical statistic.
tooltips.volatility: Annualised volatility — how much returns swing. Lower is steadier. Historical statistic, not a prediction.
tooltips.turnover: How often the portfolio rebalances. Lower generally means lower trading cost.

reports.title: Reports

card.title: Investment reports
card.descriptionSuffix: ). Click a title to render the markdown with sortable AG Grid for any table with 10+ rows. Historical backtest results, not a forecast.

reports.empty: No investment reports yet — run the canonical backtest to generate one.

detail.metricsDescription: Parsed from this report's metrics table — historical backtest statistics, not predictions.
detail.bodyDescription: Markdown + GFM tables; heavy tables (≥10 rows) render as sortable AG Grid.
detail.crossLinksDescriptionPrefix: Repo paths referenced by this report.

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.disclaimerBody: This page produces a manual review checklist; the workbench never places orders. Export the markdown ticket and execute manually after independent review.

emptyAccount.title: No account on file
emptyAccount.descriptionSuffix: with cash + equity to surface target positions. Until then, gate checks render but positions stay empty.

deltas.title: Rebalance deltas
deltas.description: Target − current per sleeve (sign = buy/sell direction).

tooltips.target: Target allocation weight for this symbol in the recommended portfolio — a configuration weight, not a return prediction.
tooltips.current: Your account's current weight for this symbol (from the latest snapshot).
tooltips.delta: Target minus current — the rebalance direction (positive = buy more, negative = trim). An at-a-glance hint, not an order.

gates.title: Gate checks
gates.description: Pre-trade safety filters. All must pass before manual execution.

wash.title: Wash-sale flags
wash.description: 30-day same-symbol buy heuristic from the trade journal.

exportCard.title: Export markdown ticket
exportCard.descriptionSuffix: . The exported file carries the same research-only disclaimer pinned in

refreshTarget.title: Refresh target
refreshTarget.description: Recompute this strategy mode's target positions on demand (async background job, using the latest data).
refreshTarget.timeout: Refresh timed out — the background job may still be running; reload the page shortly.

errorKind.producer_error: Refresh failed: the target producer errored (data or scoring issue).
errorKind.empty_target: Refresh produced no target (no usable data).
errorKind.interrupted: The job was interrupted (worker restart); please retry.

news.title: Sleeve news
news.description: Recent filings & headlines affecting this sleeve, ranked by relevance. Structured metadata only — no AI commentary.
news.empty: No relevant news for this sleeve.

table.title: Public snapshot inventory
table.descriptionPrefix: Rows mirror the SnapshotMeta table; Refresh streams a synthetic 5-stage progress modal until the real

modal.title: Refreshing snapshot…
modal.description: Stages stream via SSE; the modal stays open until you close it.

toast.incomplete: Refresh ended without a complete event

table.title: Entries
table.descriptionSuffix: so the durable record on disk stays in lockstep with the workbench's run-time view.

headlines.yellow: Risk: per-sleeve drawdown over advisory threshold

tooltips.masterDrawdown: Current equity drawdown vs the all-time high, valued mark-to-market. It trips the kill-switch when it exceeds the threshold. A historical risk fact, not a forecast.
tooltips.killSwitch: Hard threshold on master drawdown. Once tripped, the panel only suggests defensive (risk-reducing) weight moves — it never blocks ticket generation (research-only).
tooltips.perSleeveDrawdown: Each sleeve's own drawdown from its peak. Any sleeve at or above the per-sleeve advisory flips the panel to yellow.
tooltips.defensiveTicket: An alternative target that rotates fully to the defensive asset (SGOV). Offered for comparison only — it is not auto-executed.

valuationBasis.costDegraded: Some dates lacked price history, so drawdown is estimated on cost basis for those points

page.title: Risk panel
page.subtitle: Live master drawdown, kill-switch threshold, and per-sleeve advisories
page.contextDescription: The B025 satellite_us_quality sleeve also appears in the per-sleeve list.
page.explainMaster: = current equity drawdown vs all-time high; trips the kill-switch when it exceeds the threshold.
page.explainKillSwitch: = hard threshold on master drawdown; only defensive weight moves are accepted once tripped.
page.explainPerSleeve: = advisory threshold on per-sleeve drawdown; any sleeve over it flips the panel to yellow.
page.sleeveNote: satellite_us_quality currently surfaces master_dd as a per-sleeve proxy; F011 wires real per-sleeve nav.

positionDiff.title: Position diff
positionDiff.description: Current account state vs target portfolio. Workbench is research-only; review and process manually in your broker.
positionDiff.emptyDescriptionSuffix: page to seed a baseline snapshot. The diff renders once cash + positions are recorded.
positionDiff.currentAllocationDescription: $ per symbol from the latest snapshot.
positionDiff.targetAllocationDescription: $ per symbol if rebalanced to target weights.
positionDiff.perSymbolDescription: Positive Δ = buy, negative Δ = sell. Reference price = position cost basis; target-only symbols are flagged below.
positionDiff.unmatchedDescription: Target symbols with no current position to anchor a price reference. Share calculations for these rows fall back to the cash basis until the symbol has a cost-basis record.
positionDiff.unmatchedEmpty: None — every target symbol has a price reference.
positionDiff.unmatchedLabel: target weight {weight}% — no cost basis on file

ticket.title: Order ticket
ticket.description: Generate a Markdown rebalance checklist. The workbench is research-only — review and process manually in your broker app.
ticket.modeCardDescription: The kill-switch tripped. The defensive ticket rotates fully into the B011 defensive sleeve; the normal ticket follows the current target portfolio.
ticket.previewCardDescriptionPrefix: The body the workbench wrote to
ticket.historyCardDescription: Newest first. Click a row to view the read-only ticket.
ticket.historyEmpty: No tickets yet. Generate one above to seed the history.

ticketDetail.descriptionSuffix: to generate a new ticket from the current diff.
ticketDetail.checklistDescription: Research-only. The workbench did not place these orders.

fills.title: Fill journal
fills.description: Upload broker CSV or enter fills manually. The workbench records what you processed; it does not place orders.
fills.ticketCardDescription: Pick the ticket these fills belong to. Voided / executed tickets are read-only.
fills.csvCardDescription: Generic / Schwab / IBKR formats auto-detected. Errors return per-row; the rest of the file is preserved for re-upload.
fills.manualCardDescription: One row per fill. Validated client-side first.
fills.rowErrorsCardDescription: Fix the listed rows and resubmit. The other rows are preserved.
fills.historyCardDescription: Persisted journal rows. Reconcile in the journal-history view (F005).
fills.historyEmpty: No fills recorded for this ticket yet.

journalHistory.title: Journal history
journalHistory.description: Past tickets, fills, and slippage analytics. Workbench is research-only.
journalHistory.trendCardDescription: Per-month avg bps over the selected rolling window.
journalHistory.trendEmpty: No processed tickets in the {window} window.
journalHistory.tableCardDescription: Sortable, filterable. Click a ticket id to open the read-only viewer.
journalHistory.tableEmptyPrefix: No tickets recorded yet. Generate one in

account.title: Account state
account.description: Edit cash + positions. Every save inserts a new snapshot (source = ui_edit) — old snapshots stay on file for reconciliation history.
account.cashCardDescription: Settled cash in the base currency.
account.positionsCardDescription: One row per held symbol; shares × avg cost contributes to equity.

login.title: Workbench sign-in
login.description: Google sign-in is the only entry point. Account creation is intentionally absent — the workbench is single-user by design.
login.restrictedNotice: This workbench is restricted to a single authorized user.

errorPage.notFoundDescription: This page does not exist or has moved. Head back to the workbench home to continue.
errorPage.errorDescription: The page failed to render. Click retry, or return to the home page. Keep the error id so the team can investigate.

validation.weightsExceedEquity: Positions notional exceeds total equity — weights must be ≤ 1.0.
validation.formHasErrors: Form has errors — fix them before saving.

toast.addAtLeastOneFill: Add at least one fill row.

paper.title: Paper Trading
paper.description: Forward simulation: give a strategy virtual capital, faithfully follow its allocation, mark to market daily with real prices, and watch its true out-of-sample forward behaviour accumulate.
paper.inactiveBody: Activate a paper account for this strategy: give it virtual capital, faithfully follow the strategy's allocation forward, marked to market daily with real prices.
paper.forwardHint: Paper account has run {days} days — accumulating forward.
paper.curveEmpty: Accumulating forward — not enough points to draw the curve yet.
paper.rebalancesEmpty: No rebalances yet (activation is the first build).
paper.rebalancesNote: Simplified: date + cost only, no per-fill detail.
paper.settingsNote: Once active it faithfully follows the strategy's latest allocation; daily 03:45 UTC it marks to market and rebalances when due (close-price fills + real costs).
paper.alignNotice: A one-time manual rebalance that builds the paper book up to the current target; day-to-day still follows cadence + drift (no daily forced re-alignment, preserving forward-validation fidelity).
paper.alignSkipped: {count} target(s) lacked a price mark and were not built: {symbols} (the daily job retries automatically once priced).
paper.alignNoTarget: No target to align to yet — refresh the target first on the recommendations page.
